不是么？各位伟大的主角！向着自己的星辰出发吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711813458,"group_id":"7276078029883837474","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3765185426504352"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276078029883837474","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"761"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":87753,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":157524,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7348628018020238104","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"算是同类书籍里偏上的那一批，在番茄里更是如此。
无论是主角的描写，还是玩家的安排，剧情的规划都是透露着一股活泼且清新的味道。
正如网友们的评论，偶尔穿插的回忆杀，确实可以很好的给我解惑，可总是或许突兀，也许可以让玩家们探索从世界的遗迹中找到“安”的秘密。
当然，一切都才刚刚开始自然不可急于求成，愿你的书越来越成熟。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710989853,"group_id":"7276078029883837474","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"但风向是会转变的，终有一天，会吹向更有光亮的地方。从今往后","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N86jny+jkLKF6N3Au5e+2r/ltvozuG9wqOx9JKUcNeK0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/97d8ba4ef3b943f0b280d629c9018b13~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796717&x-signature=r%2Bxra%2BAzF6zn4vHaMS6OVeIQQBg%3D","user_id":"3765185426504352","user_name":"昵称修正"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3765185426504352","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1724412826,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276078029883837474","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾】+【无女主！专注搞事业】+【脑洞】楚随安，人如其名随遇而安且有点小社恐。在中了两亿大奖后便准备养老生活，可谁知他竟然穿越到了异世界！
幸好老天待他不薄，楚随安被查出来拥有着不凡的魔法天赋！可以进入魔法圣地——法师塔里学习。
为了网络、为了两个亿！楚随安努力学习勤勤恳恳闭关两百年终于研制出可以穿越回去的机器！
但他惊恐发现大陆上的人类好像全都消失了，
现在的大陆是莫名变得暴躁的魔兽所横行的世界!
没关系，反正他就要跑路了，这个世界的死活关他屁事。
可他研制出来的穿越机器它……它只能通过无生命体和灵魂！
哦NO，跑路失败，为了在这危机四伏的大陆上存活下去，楚随安决定——从老家摇人！
把异世界包装成游戏，让那群凶残的玩家魂穿过来给他打工！！
不过……玩家怎么老把自己当成幕后boss？
ps：非传统第四天灾文，内含大量主线剧情，玩家是推主线工具人
隔壁新书【我都成神了！你们还在新手村？】火热连载中！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9e4c1fc1f7f050e0085669084e641b17","author":"稀粥世洲","author_id":"","book_id":"7276078029883837474","book_name":"第四天灾在线受苦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8599人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7276078205075718656","read_count":"8599","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1002487"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"658","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,无女主,架空,无后宫,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/52fa1fe615a055f22daa92ef8021a8ea~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453205&x-signature=C3rgOSwpBOE891X8B%2BH1EVNHD3E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"154401824578077","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"703"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232033250F6352C8641E01467167"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读40小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":80572,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":143235,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":4669},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7330760308298777406","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"全员智商没掉，不错不错！！！但是穿插的回忆，这个真的很难受，有时候莫名其妙就换个场景，多看几页才知道是回忆录，后面的身份也是越编越离谱，而且全程虽然在说主角社恐，但是一点社恐的氛围都没感觉到，就比较平铺吧！挺喜欢这个游戏发展的，详细归详细，但是没有烂梗！总之可以！看着篇幅挺多还以为运气好遇到了一篇快完结的，还想笑一下前面的人辛苦等更新，看到后面才发现，我也得等[撇嘴]！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706834108,"group_id":"7276078029883837474","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"*","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwq/exsby7MDUe0xdsRJf1SrEMWNOAv6bygtoq7ZpsH5","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aa45f2508083479b82713baf0cc3407f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788472&x-signature=4Nuq1D7WxahQ8G3ov0SWCswA%2FFw%3D","user_id":"3197035718130775","user_name":"f201508094"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3197035718130775","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276078029883837474","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾】+【无女主！专注搞事业】+【脑洞】楚随安，人如其名随遇而安且有点小社恐。在中了两亿大奖后便准备养 20241218完

真的是，上学上得把我脑袋进化没了，重要的信息忘写正评里了[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734536739,"group_id":"7276078029883837474","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"985584196137791"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276078029883837474","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1175"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读34小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":59249,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":122603,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7449764307992806169","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看！这本不知道为什么会感觉更好玩（恩赐的游戏相比，那本会废土风一点）这本更有人味，大概（？）
两百多年！！一步一步成长到现在，在异世界被人排挤，欺负，安只是想回家，安有什么错……
超爱吃飞醋占有欲与自尊心极强的洁癖黑龙，听不进劝又爱钻牛角尖的暴躁人鱼、经商很有一手但无时无刻不想着钻进金库偷吃军费的史莱姆、整日酗酒打架飙脏话几乎没有清醒时候的精灵，满嘴都是神请保佑但实际上比谁都不屑的流放法师，以及一群首领说什么都是对的无脑追随者真爱粉们……
可爱的伙伴！完美的冒险！

可恶，上学上的彻底把我语言系统进化没了。。","text_exts":[{"e":70,"s":67,"text":"异世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426920501467167%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227449764307992806169%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227276078029883837474%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734536538,"group_id":"7276078029883837474","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只会瞎说，一派胡言天选之子","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwcTr52f+OjXdMJM0Z4leEs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/31659a9c65d74a1893c280e7a6d42b77~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792352&x-signature=V7cSZwyIBoNUGCt0Lh4uQNF571E%3D","user_id":"985584196137791","user_name":"嬴某某某某"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"985584196137791","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7276078029883837474","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾】+【无女主！专注搞事业】+【脑洞】楚随安，人如其名随遇而安且有点小社恐。在中了两亿大奖后便准备养老生活，可谁知他竟然穿越到了异世界！
